description_long: This stone obelisk stands on a square, multi-tiered base constructed from stacked stone and concrete, with a prominent plaque and relief panel on its front face. The main shaft is rectangular and tapers slightly upward, topped by a sculpted figure or statue, possibly representing a historical or allegorical character. The front and side faces feature carved reliefs, with the frontmost relief depicting a scene or emblem, while the other sides are more subdued. The base is bordered by a stone platform, slightly raised above the surrounding ground, and the entire structure has a weathered, aged appearance. The obelisk is primarily gray and off-white, with some darker stonework at the base. The overall design is formal and commemorative, suitable for a public square or park.
description: A tall, stone obelisk with a sculpted figure on top, relief carvings, and a multi-tiered stone base with a plaque. The structure is gray and off-white, with a weathered, commemorative appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main relief panel, a large plaque, and the sculpted figure atop the obelisk.
description_view_1: Side view with a secondary relief and partial view of the plaque, showing more of the base's stonework.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal ornamentation, showing the plain back of the obelisk and the layered stone base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another relief panel and a partial view of the base and platform.
attribute_inscription: There is a visible plaque with engraved text on the front face of the base, likely in Latin or a European language, but the text is not fully legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative relief carvings are present on the front and side faces, including a detailed scene or emblem on the front and additional motifs on the sides. The top features a sculpted figure.
attribute_base_design: The base is square and multi-tiered, constructed from stacked stone and concrete, with a prominent plaque and relief panel on the front. The lowest tier is a broad stone platform.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is adorned with a sculpted figure or statue, adding a unique and decorative finish to the obelisk.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a square stone platform, slightly raised above the ground. No other surrounding features are visible.
